billing.subject: Invoice Dispute - {company} regarding {amount} for {product}
billing.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

I am writing to dispute the recent invoice sent by {company} for the purchase of {product}. We were billed {amount} on {date}, which is higher than the previously agreed upon rate. Could you please review your billing records and correct this miscalculation? Please let us know when we can expect a revised invoice so we can process the payment promptly.

Regards,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Overcharged {amount} for {product} by {company}
billing.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

You have significantly overcharged us for our recent order of {product} on {date}! We were billed {amount}, and this is completely unacceptable. We demand an immediate explanation and a refund to our account. We have been a loyal client of {company} and expect better billing practices. If this is not resolved swiftly, we will have to reconsider our vendor relationship.

Sincerely frustrated,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Payment issue regarding {product} - {company} VIP
billing.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

This is {sender_name} from {company}. We encountered a payment error when trying to remit {amount} for our {product} subscription on {date}. The transaction keeps failing on your payment portal. As an enterprise client, we need this resolved ASAP so our service isn't interrupted. Please manually process our payment or provide an alternative wire transfer routing number.

Best,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Inquiry about upcoming charge for {product} - {company}
billing.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

I just wanted to ask a quick question about the upcoming auto-renewal for {product}. I see a pending charge from {company} for {amount} scheduled on {date}. Could you please break down the cost for the new billing cycle? We might need to adjust our license count before the charge goes through.

Thank you,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Declined transaction for {amount} on {date} - {company}
billing.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

I received an automated alert generated by {company} stating that our credit card payment of {amount} for {product} was declined on {date}. I have confirmed with our bank that the card is active and has sufficient funds. Is it possible there is a temporary glitch on your end? Let me know.

Thanks,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Request for refund of {amount} for {product} - {company}
billing.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

I would like to request a refund from {company} for {product}. I paid {amount} on {date}, but the product did not meet our expected specifications. The sales landing page was somewhat misleading regarding the software integration capabilities. Please advise on how to process a prompt refund.

Regards,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Change billing address for {company} {product} subscription
billing.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

Please update the billing address on file for {company} regarding our {product} subscription. Our scheduled monthly payment of {amount} on {date} should reflect our new corporate address. Please confirm once the system has been updated so our accounting department can expect the correct invoice.

Thank you,
{sender_name}

billing.subject: Missing receipt for {product} from {company} on {date}
billing.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

Can someone please send me the formal receipt for our recent {product} purchase? We were billed {amount} by {company} on {date}, but our bookkeeper didn't receive an automated receipt in her inbox. We need this for end-of-month reconciliation. Please email it back to me directly.

Best,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Critical Bug: {product} is crashing constantly - {company}
support.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

Since the update on {date}, {product} has been completely unusable for our team at {company}. The application crashes immediately upon startup. We are losing valuable working hours as our staff relies entirely on this software to complete their tasks. We need someone from technical support to engage with us immediately to troubleshoot and resolve this blocker.

Regards,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Disappointed with {product} performance - {company}
support.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

We purchased {product} from {company} recently and installed it on {date}. Frankly, the performance is miserable. The sync feature takes an eternity, and the interface stutters. This is not what we were promised! We expect much better quality assurance. We need your engineers to figure out what is wrong or we are switching to a competitor immediately.

Angry Customer,
{sender_name}

support.subject: VIP Support Needed: {product} configuration error - {company}
support.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

This is {sender_name} reaching out from {company}. As you know, we are a key strategic partner. Unfortunately, after setting up {product} on {date}, we've encountered a fatal configuration conflict with our internal databases. We urgently need a senior support engineer to jump on a bridge with us today to fix this configuration drift. Our executives are monitoring this closely.

Best Regards,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Help with {product} reset password - {company}
support.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

I seem to have locked myself out of {product} on {date}. The forgot password link provided by {company} isn't sending the reset email to my inbox. Could you please manually trigger a password reset for my account so I can log back in?

Thanks,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Question about {product} export feature - {company}
support.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

I am trying to use the data export functionality in {product} as of {date}, but the CSV format is not aligning properly. Does {company} provide any documentation or tutorials on how to correctly structure the custom export fields? Any guidance would be much appreciated.

Best,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Feature Request: Add dark mode to {product} by {company}
support.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

Our team has been using {product} daily since {date}. A consistent complaint from our developers is the lack of a dark mode theme, which causes eye strain during long sessions. Would {company} be willing to consider adding a dark mode toggle in the upcoming roadmap?

Thanks for considering,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Data missing in {product} dashboard - {company}
support.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

Upon checking the {product} dashboard on {date}, I noticed that almost two weeks of historical data from {company} is simply missing. It was visible yesterday. Can someone please investigate if there is an ongoing outage or if our data is permanently lost? This is quite concerning.

Regards,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Slow loading times using {product} on {date} - {company}
support.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

We have experienced unusually slow loading times using {product} throughout {date}. Simple queries take up to thirty seconds to resolve. Is {company} experiencing server degradation or increased load? Please let us know so we can inform our internal users accordingly.

Thank you,
{sender_name}

hr.subject: New employee onboarding instructions for {date} - {company}
hr.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

We are preparing to welcome a new batch of hires at {company} on {date}. Could you please send over the latest onboarding documentation and the checklist for setting up their hardware? We need to ensure everything is ready before their start date.

Warmly,
{sender_name}

hr.subject: PTO request from {sender_name} - {company}
hr.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

I would like to submit a formal request for Paid Time Off starting on {date}. I plan to take one week for a family vacation. My current projects for {company} are well advanced, and I will ensure proper handover documentation is prepared. Please let me know if this request is approved.

Thanks,
{sender_name}

hr.subject: Clarification regarding {company} benefits policy starting {date}
hr.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

I attended the recent HR briefing on {date} concerning the updated {company} health benefits policy. I have a few specific questions regarding the out-of-pocket maximums and how the dental coverage applies to dependents. Do you have time for a brief 10-minute call later this week to clarify?

Best,
{sender_name}

hr.subject: Quarterly performance review scheduling - {company}
hr.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

It is time again to schedule our quarterly performance reviews for the engineering department at {company}. Please look at my calendar for {date} and propose a few 30-minute blocks where we can discuss my progress, target KPIs, and feedback.

Thank you,
{sender_name}

hr.subject: Updating direct deposit information for {company} payroll
hr.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

I have recently switched banks and need to update my direct deposit information for {company} payroll before the cycle closing on {date}. Could you please send me a secure link or the necessary forms to update my banking details securely?

Regards,
{sender_name}

hr.subject: Workplace harassment concern - Confidential - {company}
hr.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

I am writing to formally report an uncomfortable incident that took place on {date} involving another employee at {company}. I would like to arrange a confidential meeting with an HR representative as soon as possible to discuss my concerns and understand the grievance procedures available.

Sincerely,
{sender_name}

security.subject: URGENT: Suspicious login activity detected from {company} on {date}
security.body: We have detected a series of suspicious login attempts targeting your {company} administrative accounts on {date}. Multiple geographic anomalies were flagged by the intrusion detection system. Please review our findings and confirm if these logins were authorized, or immediately rotate credentials and secure the perimeter.

security.subject: Critical Vulnerability in {product} - Action Required by {date}
security.body: This is a security advisory regarding a zero-day vulnerability discovered in {product}. The exploit could allow unauthorized remote code execution on {company} servers. An emergency patch was released on {date}. You must immediately apply the patch and verify your system integrity against potential IOCs (Indicators of Compromise).

security.subject: Possible Data Breach: Credentials for {company} leaked on {date}
security.body: Our threat intelligence feeds have flagged a possible data exposure. On {date}, a cache of user credentials seemingly belonging to {company} employees was posted on a dark web forum. We urgently need coordinates with your incident response team to validate the authenticity of the leaked credentials and begin containment procedures.

security.subject: MFA configuration bypassed on {company} root account - {date}
security.body: An automated system alert was triggered on {date} indicating that the Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) policy was disabled or bypassed on a root administrative account. This is a severe policy violation for {company}. Immediate manual intervention is required to lock down the account and investigate the audit logs.

vendor.subject: Partnership proposal from {company} - Exploring {product}
vendor.body:
Dear {recipient_name},

I am reaching out from {company}. We have been following your growth and believe there is significant synergy between our platforms. We have an upcoming product, {product}, launching on {date}. We would love to discuss a potential vendor partnership or integration. Let me know when you are available for a brief introductory call.

Best,
{sender_name}

vendor.subject: Contract Renewal Strategy - {company} & {product} - {date}
vendor.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

Our current vendor agreement for {product} is set to expire on {date}. I wanted to touch base regarding the renewal process. {company} has proposed a few minor adjustments to the terms to better align with our projected scaling requirements. Can we schedule a meeting next week to finalize the contract details?

Regards,
{sender_name}

vendor.subject: Supply chain update for {product} components - {company}
vendor.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

This is an informative update from your supplier, {company}. Due to unforeseen logistical constraints, the delivery of raw components for your {product} scheduled for {date} will face a slight delay. We anticipate a delay of 3 to 5 business days. We apologize for any inconvenience and are working hard to expedite the shipping.

Thanks,
{sender_name}

vendor.subject: Exclusive {company} discount catalog for {product}
vendor.body:
Dear Partner,

We appreciate your continued business! As a valued affiliate, {company} is pleased to offer you our exclusive wholesale catalog for {product}. Orders placed before {date} will receive an automatic 15% discount. Please find the attached pricing sheet and let our sales team know if you wish to place an order.

Cheers,
{sender_name}

spam.subject: Lose 10 pounds by {date} with {product}!
spam.body:
Are you tired of grueling workouts? Do you want a healthier lifestyle without the effort? Try {product} today! Developed by generic researchers at {company}, this miraculous supplement burns fat while you sleep! Act now and receive a second bottle absolutely free! Order before {date} to lock in your discount. Click here to claim.

Unsubscribe via link.

spam.subject: You have won {amount} from {company} - Claim by {date}
spam.body:
CONGRATULATIONS {recipient_name}! 

Your email address has been randomly selected as the lucky winner of our grand prize of {amount} in the {company} annual sweepstakes! You must claim your winnings immediately. Please remit a small processing fee of $49 via Western Union to facilitate the transfer by {date}. Do not miss out on your fortune! Reply to this email with your banking details.

spam.subject: Boost your SEO rankings for {company} today!
spam.body:
Hello {recipient_name},

I was browsing the {company} website on {date} and noticed your search engine rankings are critically low! I am an SEO guru and my agency can guarantee you page 1 rankings on Google within weeks using our proprietary {product}. Let us schedule a mandatory consultation call. Ignore this at the peril of your business.

Regards,
{sender_name}

spam.subject: Last notice regarding your {company} warranty for {product}
spam.body:
Dear customer,

This is your final courtesy notice regarding the extended warranty for your {product}. Our records indicate it expired on {date} and you are currently driving without coverage. Please call 1-800-FAKE-NUM immediately to renew your policy for only {amount}. Failure to act will result in liability for all repair costs.

spam.subject: Invest in {company} cryptocurrency - Launching {date}!
spam.body:
Dear Investor,

Get in on the ground floor! The revolutionary new cryptocurrency token, {product}, is having its presale on {date}. Backed by completely unverified claims from {company}, this coin is guaranteed to increase in value by 10,000%! Minimum investment is {amount}. Send BTC to the wallet address below to secure your tokens.

spam.subject: Lonely singles in your area - meet {sender_name} on {date}
spam.body:
Hi {recipient_name},

Are you tired of spending weekends alone? Join {company} dating network and meet beautiful people like {sender_name} near you tonight! Membership is free but premium features cost {amount}. Sign up before {date} to activate your trial and start chatting with local singles looking for romance.

internal.subject: Weekly all-hands meeting agenda for {date} - {company}
internal.body:
Team,

Please review the attached agenda for our upcoming all-hands meeting on {date}. We will be discussing the Q3 OKRs, the upcoming launch of {product}, and welcoming three new hires. There will also be a brief update from {sender_name} on the {company} financial results. Bring your questions to the Q&A segment.

Thanks,
Management

internal.subject: Reminder: Refrigerator cleanout on {date} - Office Admin
internal.body:
Hi everyone,

This is a friendly reminder that the communal refrigerators at the {company} office will be thoroughly cleaned out on {date} at 4 PM. Please ensure you remove any personal food items or tupperware before then. Anything left behind will be unceremoniously discarded by {sender_name}. Thank you for maintaining a clean workspace!

Best,
Facilities

internal.subject: Action Required: Update {company} signature format by {date}
internal.body:
Hello team,

Marketing has released a new standardized email signature template to align with the latest {company} brand guidelines. Please update your email signatures in Outlook/Gmail using the formatting guide posted on the intranet before {date}. This ensures a consistent professional appearance when communicating with clients regarding {product}.

Regards,
{sender_name}

internal.subject: Holiday party RSVP - {company} - {date}
internal.body:
Dear Colleagues,

The annual {company} holiday party is scheduled for {date}! This year we will be hosting a dinner and casino night to celebrate our hard work on {product}. Please RSVP via the internal portal so we can finalize the catering headcount and dietary restrictions. Spouses and partners are welcome.

Cheers,
{sender_name}

internal.subject: IT Notification: Server maintenance scheduled for {date} at {company}
internal.body:
Attention staff,

The IT department at {company} will be performing routine server maintenance and database optimizations starting at midnight on {date}. As a result, access to internal systems including {product} repositories will be intermittent or unavailable for approximately 4 hours. Plan your work accordingly to prevent data loss.

Thank you,
{sender_name}

internal.subject: Welcome our new VP of Engineering to {company}!
internal.body:
Team,

I am thrilled to announce that {sender_name} has officially joined {company} as our new Vice President of Engineering, starting {date}. They bring a wealth of experience scaling enterprise architecture and will be leading the development of our next generation {product}. Please take a moment to introduce yourselves on Slack and welcome them aboard.

Best regards,
CEO
